message:
feat(tui): enhance TUI views and refactor workflow engine

Extend TUI app.rs with additional view state management and input
handling for new search index features. Expand views.rs with enriched
display logic for search results including semantic scores, fusion
ranks, and pipeline diagnostics.

Refactor workflows.rs to restructure step execution, improve nested
workflow handling, and align with updated search pipeline capabilities.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
